name: list_repo_boards
short_description: List available boards from Board Store
full_help:
list_repo_boards

Description: 
List available boards from Board Store

Syntax: 
list_repo_boards  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<board>]

Returns: 
Nothing

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<board>]   Name of boards to list, default is to list all boards

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
